result.markdown:
--- title: "第10次课—初级绘图函数plot" --- ::: {.cell} :::
# plot函数简单用法: Generic X-Y Plotting 以R语言自带的mtcars数据集为例 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt)#当只有一个参数时，索引与值 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot1-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot1-2.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars)#也就是所谓的图集 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot1-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （一）修改图形主体部分 修改类型 增加一个type参数，即可修改图形的类型了 ![图9-1：plot绘图类型](H:/上课材料/R语言编程基础/R 语言第二次2021年春夏/material figures/plot_type.png){ width=70% } ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,type = "p")#点图 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot2-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,type = "l")#折线图 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot2-2.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,type = "b")#点折线图 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot2-3.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,type = "o")#连点图 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot2-4.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,type = "h")#垂直图 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot2-5.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,type = "s")#阶梯图 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot2-6.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （二）修改图像元素大小 cex : 修改点图中点的大小 lwd ：修改线图中线的粗细 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,cex=1) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot3-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,cex=2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot3-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （三）修改图形元素的形状 pch： 修改点的类型 lty ：修改线条的类型 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,pch=1) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot4-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,pch=2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot4-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: ![图9-2：plot绘图所用的点类型](H:/上课材料/R语言编程基础/R 语言第二次2021年春夏/material figures/plot_pch.jpg){ width=50% } ![图9-3：plot绘图所用的线类型](H:/上课材料/R语言编程基础/R 语言第二次2021年春夏/material figures/plot_lty.png){ width=50% } # （四）修改图形元素的颜色 col： 设置颜色 -col： 取值可以是颜色名称如"blue"，RGB值如rgb(0,0,1)，颜色代码如"#0000FF" -运行colours()可以获取颜色的名称，总共有657种 ![图9-4：plot绘图所用的657种颜色类型](H:/上课材料/R语言编程基础/R 语言第二次2021年春夏/material figures/plot_col657.jpg){ width=70% } -运行rainbow(n)可以获得n种彩虹色 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,cex=3,pch=1,col=rainbow(10)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot6-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,cex=3,pch=1,col=as.factor(mtcars$vs))#根据发动机排列类型标记颜色 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot6-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （五）设置图形标题 main：设置主标题 sub：设置次标题 xlab：设置x轴标题 ylab：设置y轴标题 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg, cex=3,pch=1,col=rainbow(10), xlab = "Weight", ylab="Miles per gallon" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot7.0-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （六）修改文字大小 cex.axis : 坐标轴刻度文字大小 cex.lab: 坐标轴标题文字大小 cex.main ： 主标题文字大小 cex.sub ：次标题文字大小 # （七）修改文字字体 font.axis : 设置坐标刻度字体，1常规字体，2加粗字体，3斜体字，4斜体加粗 font.lab：设置坐标轴标题字体，取值同font.axis font.main ：设置主标题字体，取值同font.axis font.sub ：设置次标题字体，取值同font.axis family：设置字体样式系列，family = 'serif'，family = 'sans'，family = 'mono' # （八）添加标题和禁用标题 ann = FALSE : 设置之后即可不显示原标题 title() : 使用title()函数可以为图形另外设置标题，其参数与plot()函数中设置标题的参数相同 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg, cex=3,pch=1,col=rainbow(10), xlab = "Weight", ylab="Miles per gallon", ann=F ) plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg, cex=3,pch=1,col=rainbow(10), xlab = "Weight", ylab="Miles per gallon", ann=F ) title(xlab = "Weight", col.lab = "orange", cex.lab = 1.5, font.lab = 3) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot7-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （九）隐藏框架线及坐标轴 fram.plot = FALSE ： 隐藏框架线 xaxt = "n" ： 隐藏X轴，会留下框架 yaxt = "n" ： 隐藏Y轴，会留下框架 axes=FALSE：隐藏所有坐标轴及框架线 # （十）设置坐标轴取值范围 xlim: 设置x轴取值范围 ylim： 设置y轴取值范围 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg, cex=1,pch=1,col=rainbow(10), xlab = "Weight", ylab="Miles per gallon", ylim=c(0,35), xlim=c(0,6) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot8-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （十一）修改图形整体尺寸大小 通过par()函数进行调节 no.readonly = TRUE : 设置画板的参数为可修改状态 pin: 以英寸表示的图形尺寸（宽和高） mai: 以数值向量表示的边界大小，顺序为“下、左、上、右”，单位为英寸 mar: 以数值向量表示的边界大小，顺序为“下、左、上、右”，单位为英分。默认（5,4,4,2）+ 0.1 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} opar <- par(no.readonly = TRUE) par(pin = c(3,5), mar = c(5,8,2,6)) plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg, cex=1,pch=1,col=rainbow(10), xlab = "Weight", ylab="Miles per gallon", ylim=c(0,35), xlim=c(0,6) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot9-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} par(opar) ``` ::: # （十二）给图形添加参考线 通过abline()函数添加 参数 v : 垂直参考线的位点 h : 水平参考线的位点 lty: 参考线的样式 col：参考线的颜色 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg, cex=1,pch=1,col=rainbow(10), xlab = "Weight", ylab="Miles per gallon", ylim=c(0,35), xlim=c(0,6) ) abline(v = seq(0,6,1), h = seq(0,35,5), lty = 3, col = "blue") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot10-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: # （十三）添加文本 **text()向绘图区域内部添加文本** text(x, y , labels , pos , cex , col ) x: 标注位点的横坐标 y : 标注位点的纵坐标 labels: 所要添加的标注内容 pos: 标注所在相对位置，1，2，3，4 分别代表下，左，上，右 cex: 字体大小 col: 字体颜色 **mtext()向图形四个边界之一添加文本** labels : 所要添加的标注内容 side : 1,2,3,4分别代表下，左，上，右四个边界 line : 相对边界线的偏移距离 las : 标注文字的方向，0，1，垂直或水平 # （十四）组合多个图形 使用par()中的mfrow与mfcol参数组合图形 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} attach(mtcars) opar <- par(no.readonly = TRUE) par(mfrow = c(2,2)) plot(wt, mpg, cex=1,pch=1,col=rainbow(10), xlab = "Weight", ylab="Miles per gallon", ylim=c(0,35), xlim=c(0,6) ) abline(v = seq(0,6,1), h = seq(0,35,5), lty = 3, col = "blue") hist(mpg)#频率图 plot(am,mpg)#散点图 plot(as.factor(am),mpg)#箱线图 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot11-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} par(opar) detach(mtcars) ``` ::: # （十五）精细调整各图形的比例 使用函数layout()组合图形 mat : 一个矩阵，设置图形的总体布局 widths: 向量，设置图形矩阵中每列相对宽度 heights: 向量，设置图形矩阵中每行的相对高度 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} attach(mtcars) layout(matrix(c(1,1,2,3), 2, 2, byrow = TRUE)) plot(wt~mpg) hist(mpg) plot(as.factor(am),mpg) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot12-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} detach(mtcars) ``` ::: # （十六）par()中fig参数设置图形位置,叠加图形 fig 整个画布大可以理解为fig = c(0,1,0,1), 向量中的4个数依次代表：x轴起始位置0，x轴结束位置1，y轴起始位置0，y轴结束位置1 把图形摆放在画面由半部分，设置fig = c(0.5,1,0,1) 把图放在右上四分之一的位置，设置fig = c(0.5,1,0.5,1) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} attach(mtcars) opar <- par(no.readonly=TRUE) par(fig=c(0, 0.8, 0, 0.8)) plot(wt, mpg, xlab="Miles Per Gallon", ylab="Car Weight") par(fig=c(0, 0.8, 0.55, 1), new=TRUE)#new 表示在原有图形上加图 boxplot(wt, horizontal=TRUE, axes=FALSE) par(fig=c(0.65, 1, 0, 0.8), new=TRUE) boxplot(mpg, axes=FALSE) mtext("Enhanced Scatterplot", side=3, outer=TRUE, line=-3) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot13-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} par(opar) detach(mtcars) ``` ::: # （十七）以鸢尾花数据集为例子，讲解最简单的线性模型和多图形绘制 - 按品种分类，分别拟合花萼长度与花萼宽度的关系 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # species 1 sp1 <- iris[iris$Species=="setosa",] lm.fit1 <- lm(Sepal.Length~Sepal.Width,data=sp1) summary(lm.fit1) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Call: lm(formula = Sepal.Length ~ Sepal.Width, data = sp1) Residuals: Min 1Q Median 3Q Max -0.52476 -0.16286 0.02166 0.13833 0.44428 Coefficients: Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|) (Intercept) 2.6390 0.3100 8.513 3.74e-11 *** Sepal.Width 0.6905 0.0899 7.681 6.71e-10 *** --- Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1 Residual standard error: 0.2385 on 48 degrees of freedom Multiple R-squared: 0.5514, Adjusted R-squared: 0.542 F-statistic: 58.99 on 1 and 48 DF, p-value: 6.71e-10 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(sp1$Sepal.Width,sp1$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit1) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot15-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # species 2 unique(iris$Species) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] setosa versicolor virginica Levels: setosa versicolor virginica ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} sp2 <- iris[iris$Species=="versicolor",] lm.fit2 <- lm(Sepal.Length~Sepal.Width,data=sp2) summary(lm.fit2) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Call: lm(formula = Sepal.Length ~ Sepal.Width, data = sp2) Residuals: Min 1Q Median 3Q Max -0.73497 -0.28556 -0.07544 0.43666 0.83805 Coefficients: Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|) (Intercept) 3.5397 0.5629 6.289 9.07e-08 *** Sepal.Width 0.8651 0.2019 4.284 8.77e-05 *** --- Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1 Residual standard error: 0.4436 on 48 degrees of freedom Multiple R-squared: 0.2766, Adjusted R-squared: 0.2615 F-statistic: 18.35 on 1 and 48 DF, p-value: 8.772e-05 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(sp2$Sepal.Width,sp2$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot15-2.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # species 3 unique(iris$Species) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] setosa versicolor virginica Levels: setosa versicolor virginica ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} sp3 <- iris[iris$Species=="virginica",] lm.fit3 <- lm(Sepal.Length~Sepal.Width,data=sp3) summary(lm.fit3) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Call: lm(formula = Sepal.Length ~ Sepal.Width, data = sp3) Residuals: Min 1Q Median 3Q Max -1.26067 -0.36921 -0.03606 0.19841 1.44917 Coefficients: Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|) (Intercept) 3.9068 0.7571 5.161 4.66e-06 *** Sepal.Width 0.9015 0.2531 3.562 0.000843 *** --- Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1 Residual standard error: 0.5714 on 48 degrees of freedom Multiple R-squared: 0.2091, Adjusted R-squared: 0.1926 F-statistic: 12.69 on 1 and 48 DF, p-value: 0.0008435 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} plot(sp3$Sepal.Width,sp3$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit3) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot15-3.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} ############################### names(iris) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Sepal.Length" "Sepal.Width" "Petal.Length" "Petal.Width" "Species" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} library(dplyr) lms <- iris %>% group_by(Species) %>% do(broom::tidy(lm(Sepal.Length ~ Sepal.Width, .))) lms ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` # A tibble: 6 × 6 # Groups: Species [3] Species term estimate std.error statistic p.value 1 setosa (Intercept) 2.64 0.310 8.51 3.74e-11 2 setosa Sepal.Width 0.690 0.0899 7.68 6.71e-10 3 versicolor (Intercept) 3.54 0.563 6.29 9.07e- 8 4 versicolor Sepal.Width 0.865 0.202 4.28 8.77e- 5 5 virginica (Intercept) 3.91 0.757 5.16 4.66e- 6 6 virginica Sepal.Width 0.902 0.253 3.56 8.43e- 4 ``` ::: ::: - 通过par(mfrow函数)把花萼长度与花萼宽度的关系图放到一起 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} par(mfrow=c(1,3))# one row, three cols plot(sp1$Sepal.Width,sp1$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit1) plot(sp2$Sepal.Width,sp2$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit2) plot(sp3$Sepal.Width,sp3$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit3) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot16-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: - 通过layout(mat函数)集中展现图形 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} layout(matrix(c(1,2,3,4), 2, 2, byrow = TRUE)) plot(iris$Sepal.Width,iris$Sepal.Length) abline(lm(iris$Sepal.Length~iris$Sepal.Width)) plot(sp1$Sepal.Width,sp1$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit1) plot(sp2$Sepal.Width,sp2$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit2) plot(sp3$Sepal.Width,sp3$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit3) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot17-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} layout(matrix(c(1,1,1,2,3,4), 2, 3, byrow = TRUE)) plot(iris$Sepal.Width,iris$Sepal.Length) abline(lm(iris$Sepal.Length~iris$Sepal.Width)) plot(sp1$Sepal.Width,sp1$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit1) plot(sp2$Sepal.Width,sp2$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit2) plot(sp3$Sepal.Width,sp3$Sepal.Length) abline(lm.fit3) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot17-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: - 多窗口展示图形可以用函数dev.new()，然后绘图函数如plot()，关闭图形窗口，可以用graphics.off() 课堂练习：生成二维随机正态数，分别绘制数值散点图和边缘分布 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} set.seed(123) x=rnorm(500) set.seed(110) y=rnorm(500) opar <- par(no.readonly=TRUE) par(fig=c(0, 0.8, 0, 0.8)) plot(x,y) par(fig=c(0, 0.8, 0.55, 1), new=TRUE) plot(density(x),axes=F,frame.plot=F, xlab="", ylab="",main="") par(fig=c(0.65, 1, 0, 0.8), new=TRUE) plot(density(y)$y,density(y)$x,axes=F,frame.plot=F, xlab="", ylab="",main="",type = "l") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](lecture10_files/figure-html/plot14-1.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} par(opar) ``` :::
